prompt: {"type":"streetwear merch campaign moodboard","brand":{"name":"{argument name=\"brand name\" default=\"curated.supply\"}","logo":"minimal eight-spoke asterisk symbol","tagline":"{argument name=\"tagline\" default=\"Discover well-designed, carefully curated products\"}","aesthetic":"minimal premium industrial lifestyle branding, monochrome palette, editorial fashion photography"},"image":{"aspect_ratio":"16:9","background":"dark nighttime urban and concrete interiors","lighting":"flash photography mixed with dim ambient city light, moody, glossy highlights, realistic grain","composition":"tight 4-row collage grid with 15 tiles separated by thin black dividers"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"apparel on models","position":"across the collage","count":9,"labels":["white t-shirt back with small asterisk near neck and brand name centered","black t-shirt back with large white asterisk graphic","white t-shirt front with small left-chest brand wordmark","black hoodie back with brand name at top, small asterisk, four product icons, and multiline tagline","black t-shirt back with centered brand wordmark only","white t-shirt front with four small product icons across chest and tiny asterisk below","black t-shirt back with oversized white asterisk and tiny wordmark near hem","black t-shirt back close crop with centered brand wordmark only","white t-shirt back on woman with large black asterisk and brand name near lower back"]},{"title":"accessories and objects","position":"middle and lower rows","count":6,"labels":["bright orange book beside a monochrome pump bottle","cream canvas tote bag with brand name, beside sunglasses, small bottle, and compact device","silver aluminum suitcase beside a white-and-black speaker or appliance box","hand holding a slim black wallet with a small asterisk mark","black tote bag with large multiline tagline and brand name, styled with camera, spray bottle, and dark packaging","black baseball cap with white asterisk logo"]}],"text_elements_count":6},"subjects":{"models":"young adults, faces intentionally obscured or cropped, casual poses, mostly seen from back or chest-down","styling":"black and white oversized streetwear, jeans, leather shoulder bag, minimal jewelry and watch","props":"luxury everyday carry and tech-inspired lifestyle objects"},"design_details":{"graphics":["small chest wordmark","large back asterisk symbol","small neck asterisk","four tiny product pictogram icons: bottle, rectangular device, draped fabric or garment, kettle or bag silhouette","multiline manifesto text on hoodie and tote"],"color_palette":["black","white","charcoal","gray concrete","metallic silver","accent orange"]},"camera":{"lens":"35mm to 50mm editorial lifestyle photography","framing":"mix of waist-up model shots, close-up product shots, and flat lay styling","focus":"sharp apparel graphics and textures"},"quality":"high-end fashion campaign, realistic, polished, cohesive merch lookbook for {argument name=\"product line\" default=\"streetwear and lifestyle accessories\"} promoting {argument name=\"brand name\" default=\"curated.supply\"} with visible text kept clean and legible, including the wordmark, logo symbol, and {argument name=\"book title\" default=\"dieter rams\"} on the orange book"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"街头服饰周边宣传项目","brand":{"name":"{argument name=\"brand name\" default=\"curated.supply\"}","logo":"极简八辐星号符号","tagline":"{argument name=\"tagline\" default=\"探索精心设计、严选的产品\"}","aesthetic":"极简高端工业风生活方式品牌，单色调，编辑风时尚摄影"},"image":{"aspect_ratio":"16:9","background":"昏暗的夜间都市与混凝土室内环境","lighting":"闪光灯摄影混合昏暗的城市环境光，忧郁氛围，光泽高光，写实颗粒感","composition":"紧凑的 4 行拼贴网格，包含 15 个由细黑线分隔的图块"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"模特服饰","position":"横跨整个拼贴","count":9,"labels":["白色 T 恤背面，颈部附近有小星号，品牌名称居中","黑色 T 恤背面，带有巨大的白色星号图形","白色 T 恤正面，左胸前有小型品牌文字标识","黑色连帽衫背面，顶部有品牌名称、小星号、四个产品图标及多行标语","黑色 T 恤背面，仅居中品牌文字标识","白色 T 恤正面，胸前横向排列四个小型产品图标，下方有微小星号","黑色 T 恤背面，超大白色星号，下摆附近有微小文字标识","黑色 T 恤背面，仅居中品牌文字标识的特写","白色 T 恤背面，模特穿着，背部有巨大的黑色星号和下背部品牌名称"]},{"title":"配饰与物件","position":"中下两行","count":6,"labels":["亮橙色书籍旁放置单色按压瓶","奶油色帆布托特包，带有品牌名称，旁有太阳镜、小瓶子和小型设备","银色铝制行李箱旁放置黑白配色的音箱或家电包装盒","手持纤薄黑色钱包，带有小星号标识","黑色托特包，带有大型多行标语和品牌名称，搭配相机、喷雾瓶和深色包装","黑色棒球帽，带有白色星号标志"]}],"text_elements_count":6},"subjects":{"models":"年轻人，面部刻意遮挡或裁切，姿势随意，多为背影或胸部以下视角","styling":"黑白超大款街头服饰、牛仔裤、皮革单肩包、极简首饰与手表","props":"奢华日常携带品与科技感生活方式物件"},"design_details":{"graphics":["小型胸前文字标识","大型背部星号符号","小型颈部星号","四个微型产品象形图标：瓶子、矩形设备、垂坠织物或服装、水壶或包袋轮廓","连帽衫与托特包上的多行宣言文字"],"color_palette":["黑色","白色","炭灰色","混凝土灰","金属银","橙色点缀"]},"camera":{"lens":"35mm 至 50mm 编辑风生活方式摄影","framing":"腰部以上模特照、产品特写与平铺造型的混合","focus":"清晰的服饰图形与纹理"},"quality":"高端时尚宣传，写实、精致，为 {argument name=\"product line\" default=\"街头服饰与生活方式配饰\"} 打造的连贯周边画册，推广 {argument name=\"brand name\" default=\"curated.supply\"}，保持可见文字清晰易读，包括文字标识、Logo 符号以及橙色书籍上的 {argument name=\"book title\" default=\"dieter rams\"}"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 极简街头服饰周边项目：此提示词可生成写实拼贴风格的时尚周边宣传图，展示带有品牌标识的服饰与配饰，呈现出忧郁的都市编辑风格，非常适合生活方式品牌画册及社交媒体推广。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求可读；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up, grid]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: lens, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求可读；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
